title: Infosys and Formula E launch AI-powered Race Centre using Infosys Topaz
detailed_summary: Infosys and Formula E announced the launch of an AI-powered Race Centre on March 20, 2026. The platform is powered by Infosys Topaz and is intended to enhance Formula E fan engagement through real-time AI commentary, interactive features, weather tracking, race control updates, PIT BOOST and ATTACK MODE tracking, and race storytelling. The release states that Topaz agents process and integrate over 1.5 million data points across each race into the Race Centre dashboard. No contract value, revenue impact, duration, or financial guidance was disclosed.
